variants: Currently residing in Juniper Lantern Quay, Talha Khokhar was born in Kindlewick Field and later pursued his studies at Mossy Hollow College. His academic journey focused on Latin phrases, which became his professional language following his graduation. Talha joined Aegis Prism Defense, where he effectively applies his knowledge in a dynamic working environment. His career exemplifies the intersection of linguistic mastery and dedication to the defense industry.
